rows.label: qev060301_MSG0001
rows.name:
Please listen! Please listen!
My Gorkwa is broken![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_JNK0010
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev060301_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask what a Gorkwa is.

rows.label: qev060301_JNK0020
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: qev060301_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask if there is any problem with it being broken.

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0002
rows.name:
The Gorkwa... this staff was
bestowed upon the Zaruboggan
by our creator, Golbogga.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0003
rows.name:
By swinging it, we are able to revoltant
Voltant! Oh... wonderful... Golbogga...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0004
rows.name:
Please close all of your
respiratory organs right now!
Do not breathe! ...Can you do it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0005
rows.name:
To me, the Gorkwa is... the revoltant
brought about by the Gorkwa holds
exactly that much value.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0006
rows.name:
I absolutely do not want any other
Zaruboggan to touch this Gorkwa![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0007
rows.name:
However, if I don't repair it, I cannot
revoltant... which means death![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0008
rows.name:
Therefore, I thought I could allow a Ma-non with
technical skills to touch it for a brief moment, so
I would like to request repairs for the Gorkwa... but.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0009
rows.name:
Actually, you are the first non-Zaruboggan I have ever spoken
to... Even now, out of sheer nervousness, I am experiencing
palpitations, shortness of breath, and dizziness... Phew.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0010
rows.name:
For that reason, I will entrust my Gorkwa—which
is more important than my own life—to you. Could
you please request the repairs from a Ma-non?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0011
rows.name:
Ohhh... thank you very much! It is
extremely painful to part with my
Gorkwa, but I am counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0012
rows.name:
The person I want to request the
repairs from is Luldeyu-san.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0013
rows.name:
I have heard that he has a profound
interest in our Zaruboggan technology,
so he should gladly accept.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0014
rows.name:
...Phew. This is my first time speaking
with someone else for this long, but it
is a somewhat pleasant kind of tension.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0015
rows.name:
I have heard that Luldeyu-san
shows off his technical skills
in the Industrial District.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0016
rows.name:
Please hurry and have
my Gorkwa repaired...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0017
rows.name:
*Sigh*... I never thought I would feel
this anxious without my Gorkwa in hand...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0018
rows.name:
I really don't feel quite
right unless I revoltant...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0019
rows.name:
...Oh, it's you! Could it be, could it
be that you brought it back for me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0020
rows.name:
This is magnificent! It is even
more beautiful than when it was
first bestowed upon me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0021
rows.name:
Well then, I am heading
out to revoltant![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0022
rows.name: ...Huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0023
rows.name: It can't link with the backpack...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0024
rows.name:
The linking function wasn't
broken, though... What on
earth could be the matter...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_JNK0030
rows.name: Deduce

rows.label: qev060301_SEL0031
rows.name: Suggest that perhaps the repairs were not done properly.

rows.label: qev060301_JNK0040
rows.name: Accuse

rows.label: qev060301_SEL0041
rows.name: Suggest that the Gorkwa might be a fake.

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0025
rows.name:
That is a possibility, but... Is
Luldeyu-san so unskilled that he would
break an item he was requested to fix?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0026
rows.name:
Anyway, let us go and speak with Luldeyu-san.
You will accompany me, won't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0027
rows.name: A fake!? Surely not...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0028
rows.name:
But it's true that the grip and the
way it slides feel different than
usual... It lacks that seasoned feeling.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0029
rows.name:
Anyway, let us go and speak with Luldeyu-san.
You will accompany me, won't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0030
rows.name:
Luldeyu-san took my Gorkwa and headed for
Lake Hakurin in Kurogane no Tairiku...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0031
rows.name: Please bring Luldeyu-san back safely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0032
rows.name:
And please, do not forget
my Gorkwa either![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0033
rows.name:
Ah... Revoltant, revoltant... Could
this be a trial from Golbogga...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0034
rows.name: No... please wait...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0035
rows.name:
*Sniff, sniff*... This lingering
scent of Voltant is...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0036
rows.name:
Oh! My Gorkwa! I am so glad
you returned safely! I am
overwhelmed with gratitude![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0037
rows.name:
As expected, Luldeyu-san seems completely
exhausted, but with those symptoms, he
should be fine if he rests for a while.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0038
rows.name: Regardless, I am glad he is safe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0039
rows.name:
If a Ma-non were to lose his life to
Voltant, the very source of our lives,
it would have been a massive incident.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0040
rows.name:
But Luldeyu-san... you really wanted
Voltant that badly, didn't you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0041
rows.name:
Once you recover, I would love to have a
long discussion about Voltant with you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060301_MSG0042
rows.name:
Now then, I shall go and fully enjoy
revoltanting for the first time in a while![ST:wait ]
